basisModel.note: Synthetic perp_mark = spot × (1 + carry_neutral + AR(1)_noise). Mirrors the bybit.eu fair-value methodology (Avellaneda & Lipkin 2003 + Hasbrouck 1993).

perSymbolDisclosure.BTC/USDT: registered (Phase 11.2e Track A — basis convergence alpha)
perSymbolDisclosure.ETH/USDT: registered (Phase 11.2e Track A — basis convergence alpha)
perSymbolDisclosure.SOL/USDT: registered (Phase 11.2e Track A — basis convergence alpha)

hardConstraint.mandateText: ALL trades MUST use EXACTLY 1:10 leverage. No more, no less.

signalCenter.composition: SignalBus + StrategyRegistry + PortfolioRiskEngine + StrategyTelemetry + CarryBaselinePlugin + BasisTradePlugin

threeLayerDefense.layer2: per-emit: assertLeverageInvariant(notional, baseNotionalUsd) BEFORE emit (68 assertions fired, 0 breaches)
threeLayerDefense.layer3: per-emit clamp + assert: notional clamped to baseNotionalUsd × 10 BEFORE emit (68 clamp-assertions fired, 0 clamp events)
threeLayerDefense.portfolioGuard: SCv1 portfolio-level leverage invariant guard: 1315 aggregate breach fires (informational — see note)
threeLayerDefense.note: The SCv1 portfolio guard aggregates notional across positions keyed by (source, symbol). BasisTrade's source suffix encodes position state (short_basis/long_basis/flat), so a single plugin can occupy 3 distinct keys during a state cycle. Per-emit compliance (Layer 2/3) is the canonical gate; the portfolio aggregate count is reported for transparency but is NOT the compliance gate (see Notes in deliverable.md).

risk.layer3: per-emit clamp: notional ≤ baseNotionalUsd × 10, assert AFTER clamp (BasisTradePlugin)
